notes: Closed-out candidates. Roles tracked but did not advance to application. Kept so they aren't re-evaluated when they reappear in scans. Prior content preserved at archive/2026-04-28-pre-rework/archive.md.

entries.title: Infrastructure & Capital Projects - Program Controls Director, ANS
entries.reason: Pre-filter: program controls / PMO function knock-out (item 2 + agency consulting PMO).

entries.title: Manager Program Management, DA Lifecycle Experience and Services
entries.reason: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Comp Bellevue $127.2-172.1K is entirely below $180K floor (item 4 hard knock-out). 'Manager' altitude also below Sr Mgr threshold for big-tech program mgmt (item 3).

entries.title: Director, Revenue Accounting Operations - Program Management
entries.reason: Pre-filter: revenue accounting domain knock-out (item 5) + program management function knock-out.

entries.title: Program Director, Strategic Accounts
entries.reason: Re-screened post-rule-fix. JD body is professional services / customer-implementation leadership (manages Implementation Managers, Conversation Design, Customer Engineering for >$5M ARR enterprise customers) — Customer Success/Implementation function knock-out (item 2).

entries.title: IT Transformation Project Portfolio Manager, Global
entries.reason: Re-screened post-rule-fix. 'Portfolio Manager' altitude is below Director and Olympus is not big-tech (item 3 — for project/portfolio mgmt the altitude floor is Director / Head / VP at any size, OR Sr Mgr / Principal at big-tech). Healthcare/medical-device employer adds domain-pedigree friction.
